Name: ReinforceParamProtector
Description: Determines the parameters for reinforcing armor.

Fields.Name: Physical Defense
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base physical defense for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Magic Defense
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base magic defense for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Fire Defense
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base fire defense for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Lightning Defense
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base lightning defense for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Slash Defense
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base slash defense for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Strike Defense
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base strike defense for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Thrust Defense
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base thrust defense for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Poison Resistance
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base poison resistance for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Toxic Resistance
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base toxic resistance for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Bleed Resistance
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base bleed resistance for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Curse Resistance
Fields.Description: The multiplier to apply to base curse resistance for this tier of reinforcement.

Fields.Name: Resident SpEffect Offset: 1
Fields.Description: The ID offset applied to the armor's residentSpEffectId1 field value.

Fields.Name: Resident SpEffect Offset: 2
Fields.Description: The ID offset applied to the armor's residentSpEffectId2 field value.

Fields.Name: Resident SpEffect Offset: 3
Fields.Description: The ID offset applied to the armor's residentSpEffectId3 field value.

Fields.Name: Material Set Offset
Fields.Description: The ID offset applied to the armor's materialSetId field value.
